WARFRAMEMOD-STRIKE_WARFRAME.title: Strike
WARFRAMEMOD-DEFEND_WARFRAME.title: Defend
WARFRAMEMOD-SLASH_DASH.title: Slash Dash
WARFRAMEMOD-RADIAL_BLIND.title: Radial Blind
WARFRAMEMOD-RADIAL_JAVELIN.title: Radial Javelin
WARFRAMEMOD-EXALTED_BLADE.title: Exalted Blade
WARFRAMEMOD-DYNARS_SHROUD.title: Dynar's Shroud
WARFRAMEMOD-DYNARS_SHROUD.description:
Draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
Gain {InvisiblePower:diff()} [gold]Invisible[/gold].
When you are no longer [gold]Invisible[/gold], gain {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] in that turn.
WARFRAMEMOD-ECLIPSE.title: Eclipse
WARFRAMEMOD-ECLIPSE.description:
If the enemy intends to attack, apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold].
If the enemy intends to defend, apply {VulnerablePower:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
WARFRAMEMOD-ENERGY_VAMPIRE.title: Energy Vampire
WARFRAMEMOD-ENERGY_VAMPIRE.description:
Mark {IfUpgraded:show:ALL enemies|an enemy} and deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all marked enemies.
Gain {Energy:energyIcons()} when a marked enemy dies.
WARFRAMEMOD-FIREBALL.title: Fireball
WARFRAMEMOD-FIREBALL.description:
Deal {DirectDamage:diff()} damage, apply {DirectHeatPower:diff()} [gold]Heat[/gold].
Deal {SplashDamage:diff()} damage and apply {SplashHeatPower:diff()} [gold]Heat[/gold] to other enemies.
WARFRAMEMOD-FIRE_WALKER.title: Fire Walker
WARFRAMEMOD-FREEZE.title: Freeze
WARFRAMEMOD-GRASP_OF_LOHK.title: Grasp of Lohk
WARFRAMEMOD-GRASP_OF_LOHK.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Apply {VoidPower:diff()} [gold]Void[/gold] and {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold].
Add a copy of this card into your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
WARFRAMEMOD-GRENADE_FAN.title: Grenade Fan
WARFRAMEMOD-INVISIBILITY.title: Invisibility
WARFRAMEMOD-LANDSLIDE.title: Landslide
WARFRAMEMOD-PHOTON_STRIKE.title: Photon Strike
WARFRAMEMOD-PHOTON_STRIKE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
This card deals double damage to enemies with [gold]Block[/gold].
WARFRAMEMOD-PILLAGER.title: Pillager
WARFRAMEMOD-PILLAGER.description:
Remove all [gold]Block[/gold] from an enemy.
For every {BlockAmount:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] removed, gain {TotalShield:diff()} [gold]Shield[/gold].
WARFRAMEMOD-RALLY_POINT.title: Rally Point
WARFRAMEMOD-REGURGITATE.title: Regurgitate
WARFRAMEMOD-REGURGITATE.description:
Play {Cards:diff()} random {Cards:plural:Attack|Attacks} in your [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold].
Apply [gold]Poison[/gold] equal to {Cards:plural:its|their} cost to all enemies.
WARFRAMEMOD-RIP_LINE.title: Rip Line
WARFRAMEMOD-RIP_LINE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies.
For every enemy hit, draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
WARFRAMEMOD-ROAR.title: Roar
WARFRAMEMOD-SHATTER_SHIELD.title: Shatter Shield
WARFRAMEMOD-SHATTER_SHIELD.description: {ShatterShieldPower:diff()}% of attack damage blocked by your [gold]Shield[/gold] and [gold]Overshield[/gold] is reflected to your attacker this turn.
WARFRAMEMOD-SHURIKEN.title: Shuriken
WARFRAMEMOD-WHIPCLAW.title: Whipclaw
WARFRAMEMOD-WHIPCLAW.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies {Repeat:diff()} times.
Whenever an enemy is hit, temporarily increase the damage by {Increment:diff()}.
WARFRAMEMOD-AEGIS_STORM.title: Aegis Storm
WARFRAMEMOD-ARCSPHERE.title: Arcsphere
WARFRAMEMOD-ARCSPHERE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage and apply {ElectricityPower:diff()} [gold]Electricity[/gold] to all enemies.
If this card hit 3 enemies, deal damage again.
WARFRAMEMOD-BALLISTIC_BATTERY.title: Ballistic Battery
WARFRAMEMOD-BALLISTIC_BATTERY.descriptio:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] {Cards:diff()} random {Cards:plural:Attack|Attacks} in your [gold]Hand[/gold], and add {Cards:plural:its damage|their damages} to this card temporarily until this card is played again.
WARFRAMEMOD-BANISH.title: Banish
WARFRAMEMOD-BLAZING_CHAKRAM.title: Blazing Chakram
WARFRAMEMOD-BLAZING_CHAKRAM.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage and apply {HeatPower:diff()} [gold]Heat[/gold] to all enemies.
{IfUpgraded:show:For each enemy this kills|If this kills an enemy}, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
WARFRAMEMOD-BRIGHT_BONNET.title: Bright Bonnet
WARFRAMEMOD-BRIGHT_BONNET.description: At the start of your turn, add {Cards:diff()} [gold]Sproudling[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
WARFRAMEMOD-COLLECTIVE_CURSE.title: Collective Curse
WARFRAMEMOD-FIRE_BLAST.title: Fire Blast
WARFRAMEMOD-FIRE_BLAST.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Apply {HeatPower:diff()} [gold]Heat[/gold] and {FrailPower:diff()} [gold]Frail[/gold] to them.
WARFRAMEMOD-IMMOLATION.title: Immolation
WARFRAMEMOD-IMMOLATION.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage, apply {HeatPower:diff()} [gold]Heat[/gold].
Whenever you draw this card, increase its cost by {CostIncrement:energyIcons()}. Whenever you play this card, reduce its cost by {CostDecrement:energyIcons()}.
WARFRAMEMOD-MACH_RUSH.title: Mach Rush
WARFRAMEMOD-MACH_RUSH.description:
Draw X{IfUpgraded:show:+1} cards.
At the end of your turn, [gold]Exhaust[/gold] your [gold]Hand[/gold].
WARFRAMEMOD-MERCY_SYMPHONY.title: Mercy Symphony
WARFRAMEMOD-MERULINA.title: Merulina
WARFRAMEMOD-MERULINA.description:
In {MerulinaPower:diff()} {MerulinaPower:plural:turn|turns}, you receive 90% less damage, and gain 1 HP at the start of each turn.
You cannot play any Attack in {MerulinaPower:diff()} {MerulinaPower:plural:turn|turns}.
WARFRAMEMOD-METAMORPHOSED.title: Metamorphosed
WARFRAMEMOD-METRONOME.title: Metronome
WARFRAMEMOD-METRONOME.description:
Gain {InvisiblePower:diff()} [gold]Invisible[/gold].
This turn: whenever you play an Attack, temporarily gain {MetronomePower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold], whenever you play any Skill, draw {MetronomePower:diff()} {MetronomePower:plural:card|cards}.
WARFRAMEMOD-MOLT.title: Molt
WARFRAMEMOD-NULL_STAR.title: Null Star
WARFRAMEMOD-PARASITIC_LINK.title: Parasitic Link
WARFRAMEMOD-PARASITIC_LINK.description: Another player and you deal an additional {ParasiticLinkPower:diff()}% damage this turn.
WARFRAMEMOD-PENANCE.title: Penance
WARFRAMEMOD-PRISMATIC_CRYSTAL.title: Prismatic Crystal
WARFRAMEMOD-PROWL.title: Prowl
WARFRAMEMOD-PROWL.description:
Gain {InvisiblePower:diff()} [gold]Invisible[/gold].
When you are [gold]Invisible[/gold], deal an additional {ProwlPower:diff()}% damage.
WARFRAMEMOD-PYROTECHNICS.title: Pyrotechnics
WARFRAMEMOD-PYROTECHNICS.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage and apply {HeatPower:diff()} [gold]Heat[/gold] to a random enemy {Repeat:diff()} {Repeat:plural:time|times}.
WARFRAMEMOD-RADIAL_DISARM.title: Radial Disarm
WARFRAMEMOD-RADIAL_DISARM.description: Apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] to all [gold]Stunned[/gold] enemies at the end of your turn.
WARFRAMEMOD-RAZOR_GYRE.title: Razor Gyre
WARFRAMEMOD-RAZOR_GYRE.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Next turn, heal {RazorGyrePower:diff()} HP.
WARFRAMEMOD-RECOMPENSE.title: Recompense
WARFRAMEMOD-RESUPPLY.title: Resupply
WARFRAMEMOD-RESUPPLY.description: Add {Cards:diff()} random [gold]Elemental[/gold] {Cards:plural:card|cards} into your [gold]Hand[/gold]. {Cards:plural:It is|They are} free to play this turn.
WARFRAMEMOD-SCARAB_SHELL.title: Scarab Shell
WARFRAMEMOD-SEEKING_TALONS.title: Seeking Talons
WARFRAMEMOD-SHADOWGRAPH.title: Shadowgraph
WARFRAMEMOD-SHADOWGRAPH.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
{IfUpgraded:show:Choose 1 of {Choices:diff()} random card to add|Add 1 random card} into your [gold]Hand[/gold], it is free to play this turn.
WARFRAMEMOD-SMOKE_SCREEN.title: Smoke Screen
WARFRAMEMOD-SMOKE_SCREEN.description:
Gain {InvisiblePower:diff()} [gold]Invisible[/gold].
Temporarily gain {SmokeScreenPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] in this turn.
WARFRAMEMOD-SNOW_GLOBE.title: Snow Globe
WARFRAMEMOD-SNOW_GLOBE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Whenever you take damage, apply {SnowGlobePower:diff()} [gold]Cold[/gold] to your attacker.
WARFRAMEMOD-SPORES.title: Spores
WARFRAMEMOD-SPORES.description:
At the start of each turn, deal {SporesPower:diff()} damage and apply {SporesPower:diff()} [gold]Frail[/gold] to a random enemy.
Deal an additional {Increment:diff()}% damage to [gold]Frail[/gold] enemies.
WARFRAMEMOD-TECTONICS.title: Tectonics
WARFRAMEMOD-TECTONICS.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Whenever an attack is blocked in this turn, apply {TectonicsPower:diff()} [gold]Slash[/gold] to your attacker.
WARFRAMEMOD-TEMPEST_BARRAGE.title: Tempest Barrage
WARFRAMEMOD-TEMPEST_BARRAGE.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies {Repeat:diff()} times.
WARFRAMEMOD-THURIBLE.title: Thurible
WARFRAMEMOD-TURBULENCE.title: Turbulence
WARFRAMEMOD-TURBULENCE.description:
Receive {TurbulencePower:diff()}% less damage.
Damage reduction effect of [gold]Turbulence[/gold] decreases by {Decrement:diff()}% temporarily for each card drawn during your turn.
WARFRAMEMOD-WORMHOLE.title: Wormhole
WARFRAMEMOD-WORMHOLE.description: In this turn, whenever you draw a card, draw {WormholePower:diff()} additional {WormholePower:plural:card|cards} at the start of next turn.
WARFRAMEMOD-WRATHFUL_ADVANCE.title: Wrathful Advance
WARFRAMEMOD-WRATHFUL_ADVANCE.description:
Gain {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
Draw cards until you draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:Attack|Attacks}. Play {Cards:plural:the Attack| these Attacks} from your [gold]Hand[/gold].
WARFRAMEMOD-AVALANCHE.title: Avalanche
WARFRAMEMOD-AVALANCHE.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies, then apply {ColdPower:diff()} [gold]Cold[/gold] and {FrailPower:diff()} [gold]Frail[/gold] to them.
WARFRAMEMOD-BLOODLETTING_RITE.title: Bloodletting Rite
WARFRAMEMOD-BLOODLETTING_RITE.descriptio: At the start of your turn, Lose {HpLossPercent:diff()}% HP, Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
WARFRAMEMOD-CELESTIAL_TWIN.title: Celestial Twin
WARFRAMEMOD-CELESTIAL_TWIN.description: Whenever you play an Attack (Skill) that costs {Energy:energyIcons()} or more, play and [gold]Exhaust[/gold] a random Skill (Attack) from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
WARFRAMEMOD-CLOUD_WALKER.title: Cloud Walker
WARFRAMEMOD-CLOUD_WALKER.description: In this turn, every {CloudWalkerPower:diff()} {CloudWalkerPower:plural:card|cards} you draw, heal 1 HP. If you do not draw any, gain 1 [gold]Intangible[/gold].
WARFRAMEMOD-DESECRATE.title: Desecrate
WARFRAMEMOD-DESECRATE.description: At the end of combat, gain {Gold:diff()} [gold]Gold[/gold] for each non-minion enemy killed.
WARFRAMEMOD-DISPENSARY.title: Dispensary
WARFRAMEMOD-DISPENSARY.description:
At the start of your turn, cycle:
1. Gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
2. Heal 1 HP.
3. Add a random card into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
WARFRAMEMOD-EVADE.title: Evade
WARFRAMEMOD-EVADE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Gain {InvisiblePower:diff()} [gold]Invisible[/gold].
If [gold]Fatal[/gold], heal {Heal:diff()} HP.
WARFRAMEMOD-FUSION_STRIKE.title: Fusion Strike
WARFRAMEMOD-FUSION_STRIKE.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Repeat:diff()} times to all enemies, then apply {FrailPower:diff()} [gold]Frail[/gold] and {TauPower:diff()} [gold]Tau[/gold] to them.
WARFRAMEMOD-INFERNO_COMET.title: Inferno Comet
WARFRAMEMOD-INFERNO_COMET.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage and apply {HeatPower:diff()} [gold]Heat[/gold] to all enemies.
For every enemy hit, lose {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} next turn.
WARFRAMEMOD-KUMIHIMO.title: Kumihimo
WARFRAMEMOD-KUMIHIMO.description:
Choose 1 of {Choices:diff()} random [gold]Element[/gold] card to add into your [gold]Hand[/gold], repeat {Chances:diff()} {Chances:plural:time|times}. Deal damage to all enemies by the sum of the {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} these cards cost.
If all of these cards has the same cost, apply all [gold]Elements[/gold] of these cards to all enemies.
WARFRAMEMOD-MESMER_SKIN.title: Mesmer Skin
WARFRAMEMOD-MESMER_SKIN.description:
Prevent the next {MesmerSkinPower:diff()} {MesmerSkinPower:plural:damage|damages} in this turn.
[gold]Stun[/gold] the {MesmerSkinPower:plural:attacker|attackers}.
WARFRAMEMOD-NOURISH.title: Nourish
WARFRAMEMOD-NOURISH.description:
Apply {VulnerablePower:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] to all enemies.
Whenever you gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}, gain additional {Energy:energyIcons()}.
WARFRAMEMOD-OPERATOR_FORM.title: Operator Form
WARFRAMEMOD-OPERATOR_FORM.description:
If you end your turn without playing Attacks, gain {OperatorFormPower:diff()} [gold]Intangible[/gold].
At the start of your turn, gain {OperatorFormPower:diff()} [gold]Tranference Static[/gold].
WARFRAMEMOD-PEACEMAKER.title: Peacemaker
WARFRAMEMOD-PEACEMAKER.description:
At the start of your turn, add {Cards:diff()} [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Regulators+|Regulators}[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
You may not draw cards during your turn.
WARFRAMEMOD-PSYCHIC_BOLTS.title: Psychic Bolts
WARFRAMEMOD-PSYCHIC_BOLTS.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy {Repeat:diff()} times.
Whenever an enemy is hit, remove {TotalShield:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] from the enemy, then gain {TotalShield:diff()} [gold]Shield[/gold].
WARFRAMEMOD-RAZORWING.title: Razorwing
WARFRAMEMOD-RAZORWING.description:
Gain X{IfUpgraded:show:+1} [gold]Soar[/gold].
Add 1 [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Dex Pixia+|Dex Pixia}[/gold] and 1 [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Diwata+|Diwata}[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
WARFRAMEMOD-REAPER.title: Reaper
WARFRAMEMOD-REAPER.description: In this turn, whenever Attacks deal damage, they also apply {ReaperPower:diff()} [gold]Death's Harvest[/gold].
WARFRAMEMOD-RENEWAL.title: Renewal
WARFRAMEMOD-RENEWAL.description: Let all players heal {Heal:diff()} HP and gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] for X{IfUpgraded:show:+1} times.
WARFRAMEMOD-SILENCE.title: Silence
WARFRAMEMOD-SILENCE.description:
[gold]Stun[/gold] an enemy.
Reduce [gold]Buffs[/gold] of the enemy by {Decrement:diff()}.
WARFRAMEMOD-SLEIGHT_OF_HAND.title: Sleight of Hand
WARFRAMEMOD-SLEIGHT_OF_HAND.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Choose {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards} in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] to [gold]Transform[/gold] into a copy of this card.
WARFRAMEMOD-SOWER.title: Sower
WARFRAMEMOD-SWITCH_TELEPORT.title: Switch Teleport
WARFRAMEMOD-SWITCH_TELEPORT.description: At the start of your turn, put {SwitchTeleportPower:diff()} random {SwitchTeleportPower:plural:Skill|Skills} from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold], then put {SwitchTeleportPower:diff()} {SwitchTeleportPower:plural:card|cards} from your [gold]Hand[/gold] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
WARFRAMEMOD-THERMAL_SUNDER.title: Thermal Sunder
WARFRAMEMOD-TRANSMUTATION_PROBE.title: Transmutation Probe
WARFRAMEMOD-TRANSMUTATION_PROBE.descript:
Add {Cards:diff()} random {Cards:plural:Attack|Attacks} into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
The next {TransmutationProbePower:diff()} {TransmutationProbePower:plural:Attack you play applies|Attacks you play apply} [gold]Electricity[/gold] equal to the damage dealt by it.
WARFRAMEMOD-VIRULENCE.title: Virulence
WARFRAMEMOD-XATAS_WHISPER.title: Xata's Whisper
WARFRAMEMOD-XATAS_WHISPER.description: Whenever Attacks deal damage, they also apply {XatasWhisperPower:diff()} [gold]Void[/gold].
WARFRAMEMOD-CHROMATIC_BLADE.title: Chromatic Blade
WARFRAMEMOD-CHROMATIC_BLADE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage X times to all enemies.
Apply {SlashPower:diff()} [gold]Slash[/gold] and {ElectricityPower:diff()} [gold]Electricity[/gold].
WARFRAMEMOD-RESERVOIRS.title: Reservoirs
WARFRAMEMOD-RESERVOIRS.description:
Raise your Max HP by {MaxHp:diff()}.
 At the start of your turn, heal {ReservoirsPower:diff()} HP, draw {ReservoirsPower:diff()} {ReservoirsPower:plural:card|cards}, apply {ReservoirsPower:diff()} [gold]Electricity[/gold] to all enemies.
WARFRAMEMOD-AXIOS_JAVELIN.title: Axios Javelin
WARFRAMEMOD-AXIOS_JAVELIN.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy.
WARFRAMEMOD-DEX_PIXIA.title: Dex Pixia
WARFRAMEMOD-DIWATA.title: Diwata
WARFRAMEMOD-RECOMPENSE_DAGGER.title: Recompense Dagger
WARFRAMEMOD-RECOMPENSE_DAGGER.descriptio:
Heal {Heal:diff()} HP, deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
At the end of your turn, if this is in your [gold]Hand[/gold], take {SelfDamage:diff()} damage.
WARFRAMEMOD-REGULATORS.title: Regulators
WARFRAMEMOD-REGULATORS.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.
Deals an additonal {ExtraDamage:diff()} damage for every [gold]Regulators[/gold] in your [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold].
WARFRAMEMOD-SPROUDLING.title: Sproudling
WARFRAMEMOD-SPROUDLING.description:
Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
Costs {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} more for every {CardsAmount:diff()} {CardsAmount:plural:card|cards} in your [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold].
WARFRAMEMOD-TALON.title: Talon
WARFRAMEMOD-CRYSTALLIZE.title: Crystallize
WARFRAMEMOD-CRYSTALLIZE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Whenever an enemy is hit, reduce the damage by {Decrement:diff()}, then deal damage to adjacent enemies.
WARFRAMEMOD-FINAL_STAND.title: Final Stand
WARFRAMEMOD-FINAL_STAND.description: At the start of your turn, add {FinalStandPower:diff()} [gold]{FinalStandPower:plural:Axios Javelin|Axios Javelins}[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
WARFRAMEMOD-RIVEN.title: Riven
WARFRAMEMOD-RIVEN.description:
{IsUnveiled:Deal {Damage} damage{IsTargettingAllEnemies: to all enemies|}{HasRepeat: {Repeat} times|}.{HasDraw:
Draw {Draw} cards.|}{HasAdd:
Add {Add} random {Add:plural:card|cards} into your [gold]Hand[/gold].|}{HasHeal:
Heal {Heal} HP.|}{HasBonusPower:
Apply {BonusPower} [gold]{BonusPowerName}[/gold]{IsTargettingAllEnemies: to all enemies|}.|}{HasMalusCard:
Add {MalusCard} [gold]{MalusCardName}[/gold] into your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].|}{HasMalusPower:
Gain {MalusPower} [gold]{MalusPowerName}[/gold].|}|Unveil its possibilities, both rapturous and unfavorable.}
WARFRAMEMOD-SERENE_STORM.title: Serene Storm
WARFRAMEMOD-SERENE_STORM.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy X times.
WARFRAMEMOD-SYNTHESIS_SCANNER.title: Synthesis Scanner
WARFRAMEMOD-SYNTHESIS_SCANNER.descriptio:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If [gold]Fatal[/gold], obtain a random [gold]Relic[/gold] and remove this card from your [gold]Deck[/gold] at the end of combat.
WARFRAMEMOD-WYRD_SCYTHES.title: Wyrd Scythes
WARFRAMEMOD-WYRD_SCYTHES.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage and apply {VulnerablePower:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] to a random enemy {Repeat:diff()} {Repeat:plural:time|times}.
